title: rubus × permixtus
intro: Rubus × permixtus, also known as the Hybrid Raspberry or Raspberry hybrid, is a complex hybrid plant that is a cross between a raspberry and a blackberry. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health. The health benefits of Rubus × permixtus include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and provide antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Rubus × permixtus can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
